source_rights.source: Copernicus Sentinel-2 L2A imagery accessed through Microsoft Planetary Computer STAC
source_rights.policy_summary: Copernicus Sentinel data is described as available on a free, full and open basis; commercial reuse is allowed under the Copernicus/Sentinel data policy, subject to source acknowledgement and no-warranty limitations.
